title: SmartValue cloud proxy capture with G-command polling
summary: Proxy capture shows the cloud polling the logger/inverter with plain G-ASCII commands including GPDAT0, GPV, GBAT, GMOD, SVFW, GTMP, GLINE, GBUS, GCHG, GOP, GINV, GWS, TE?, Q1, and F. Captured responses provide read-only telemetry field evidence; no write-control behavior was validated.
